Title: Lava Martini
Description: Java Lava, vodka and fresh espresso, shaken hard over ice. The midnight classic — glossy and espresso-forward.
Ingredients: 50ml Java Lava · 35ml vodka · 30ml fresh espresso · 10ml sugar syrup · 3 coffee beans
Method: 1) Chill a coupe glass. | 2) Add Java Lava, vodka, espresso and syrup to a shaker filled with ice. | 3) Shake hard for 12–15 seconds until frosty and foamed. | 4) Double-strain into the coupe; garnish with three coffee beans.

Title: The Volcanic
Description: Two fingers over one large rock with an orange twist. Pure, earthy and unhurried.
Ingredients: 60ml Java Lava · 1 large ice rock · orange twist
Method: 1) Place one large clear rock in a rocks glass. | 2) Pour 60ml Java Lava over the ice. | 3) Express an orange twist over the top and drop it in.

Title: Ember & Cream
Description: Java Lava over cold brew with a float of vanilla cream. Dessert in a glass.
Ingredients: 50ml Java Lava · 90ml cold brew · 20ml vanilla cream
Method: 1) Fill a tall glass with ice. | 2) Add Java Lava and cold brew; stir gently. | 3) Float the vanilla cream over the back of a spoon.

Title: Lava & Tonic
Description: Long, refreshing and bittersweet — Java Lava lengthened with tonic and a fat orange wheel.
Ingredients: 50ml Java Lava · 120ml tonic water · orange wheel
Method: 1) Fill a highball with ice. | 2) Add Java Lava, top with tonic. | 3) Stir once and garnish with a fat orange wheel.

Title: Volcano Flat White
Description: A boozy flat white — a double shot and steamed milk laced with Java Lava.
Ingredients: 40ml Java Lava · double espresso · 120ml steamed milk
Method: 1) Pull a double espresso into a cup. | 2) Add Java Lava. | 3) Top with steamed milk and a fine layer of microfoam; dust with cocoa.

Title: Affogato Eruption
Description: A scoop of vanilla gelato drowned in espresso and a generous pour of Java Lava.
Ingredients: 1 scoop vanilla gelato · 1 shot espresso · 45ml Java Lava
Method: 1) Place a scoop of vanilla gelato in a coupe. | 2) Pull a hot espresso shot over it. | 3) Finish with a generous pour of Java Lava.
